title: Meatless Week
description: Go 7 days without eating meat. Discover delicious plant-based alternatives!
tips: Try lentil-based recipes — they're protein-packed!
Explore cuisines that are naturally vegetarian like Indian and Thai
Prep meals in advance to avoid temptation

title: Car-Free Week
description: Leave the car at home for 7 days. Walk, bike, or take public transit instead.
tips: Plan your routes using public transit apps
Combine errands to minimize trips
Try an e-bike for longer distances

title: Unplug & Save
description: Reduce standby power by unplugging devices when not in use for 7 days.
dailyGoal: Unplug at least 3 devices before bed
tips: Use a power strip to easily unplug multiple devices
Chargers draw power even when not connected to a device
Gaming consoles are major standby energy users

title: Zero Food Waste
description: Minimize food waste for 14 days through mindful shopping and meal planning.
tips: Plan meals for the week before grocery shopping
Use the FIFO method: First In, First Out
Freeze leftovers instead of throwing them away
Compost what you can't eat

title: Transit Champion
description: Use only public transit for all commutes for 14 days.
tips: Download your city's transit app for real-time updates
Bring a book or podcast for the journey
Consider a weekly/monthly transit pass for savings

title: Cold Shower Challenge
description: Take cold showers for 14 days to save energy on water heating.
tips: Start with lukewarm and gradually reduce temperature
Cold showers boost circulation and alertness
Even 2 minutes of cold water at the end helps

title: Zero Waste Month
description: Aim for zero waste for 30 days. Refuse, reduce, reuse, recycle, rot.
tips: Bring reusable bags, bottles, and containers everywhere
Buy in bulk to reduce packaging
Choose products with minimal or recyclable packaging
Start composting at home

title: Vegan for 30 Days
description: Go fully plant-based for an entire month. Your biggest impact challenge!
tips: Stock up on beans, lentils, tofu, and tempeh
Learn to make plant-based versions of your favorites
B12 supplement is recommended for extended vegan diets
Connect with vegan communities for recipes and support

title: No-Buy Challenge
description: 30 days without buying non-essential items. Focus on what you truly need.
tips: Make a list of essentials vs. wants before the challenge
Implement a 48-hour rule for any purchase temptation
Use what you already own creatively
Track money saved alongside carbon saved
